monster.name: Streetfighter [5.5e]

action.name: Fisticuffs
action.text: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Brace Up (Bonus Action)
action.text: The streetfighter gains 9 (2d8) Temporary Hit Points.

action.name: Combo (Bonus Action)
action.text: The streetfighter makes one Fisticuffs attack.

monster.description:
Streetfighters can be found hanging around shady establishments and shaking down easy marks in alleys. They aren't the type to take orders from a boss unless the threat of violence is involved.
Brawlers: Loud and brash, brawlers look for a good time or a fight but preferably both. Most brawlers are laborers and crafters who blow off steam carousing when they can scrap up the funds and scrapping when they run out. Particularly skilled brawlers can make a living fighting for the entertainment of others.
Source: Ben Huffman - Pugilist

monster.name: Wrestler [5.5e]

action.name: Grasping Strike
action.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 16).

action.name: Punch Down
action.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

action.name: Brace Up (Bonus Action)
action.text: The wrestler gains 9 (2d8) Temporary Hit Points.

action.name: Combo (Bonus Action)
action.text: The wrestler makes one Grasping Strike or Punch Down attack.

monster.description:
Wrestlers are trained athletes that grapple competitively for money and sometimes glory.
Brawlers: Loud and brash, brawlers look for a good time or a fight but preferably both. Most brawlers are laborers and crafters who blow off steam carousing when they can scrap up the funds and scrapping when they run out. Particularly skilled brawlers can make a living fighting for the entertainment of others.
Source: Ben Huffman - Pugilist

monster.name: Belligerent Brawler [5.5e]

action.name: Multiattack
action.text: The brawler makes two attacks, using Grasping Strike or Punch Down in any combination.

action.name: Grasping Strike
action.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 16).

action.name: Punch Down
action.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

action.name: Brace Up (Bonus Action)
action.text: The brawler gains 13 (3d8) Temporary Hit Points.

action.name: Combo (Bonus Action)
action.text: The brawler makes one Grasping Strike or Punch Down attack.

action.name: Enraging Insult (Bonus Action)
action.text: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature that can see or hear the brawler within 30 feet. Failure: 6 (1d8 + 2) Psychic damage, and the target has Disadvantage on attack rolls against creatures other than the brawler until the start of the brawler's next turn.

monster.description:
There's not a belligerent brawler in every tavern but every belligerent brawler can be found in one. They smell strongly of whatever drink they're carrying in their flask.
Brawlers: Loud and brash, brawlers look for a good time or a fight but preferably both. Most brawlers are laborers and crafters who blow off steam carousing when they can scrap up the funds and scrapping when they run out. Particularly skilled brawlers can make a living fighting for the entertainment of others.
Source: Ben Huffman - Pugilist

monster.name: Boxer [5.5e]

action.name: Multiattack
action.text: The boxer makes three attacks, using Grasping Strike or Punch Down in any combination.

action.name: Grasping Strike
action.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 16).

action.name: Punch Down
action.text: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

action.name: Brace Up (Bonus Action)
action.text: The boxer gains 18 (4d8) Temporary Hit Points.

action.name: Combo (Bonus Action)
action.text: The boxer makes one Grasping Strike or Punch Down attack.

reaction.name: Cross Counter
reaction.text: Trigger: The boxer is hit by a melee attack made by a creature. Response: The boxer reduces the damage it takes by 18 (4d8) and deals that much Bludgeoning damage to the target if it is within 5 feet.

monster.description:
Boxers get paid to beat people up and get beaten up in return. It's generally best to avoid being within arm's reach of one in a fight.
Brawlers: Loud and brash, brawlers look for a good time or a fight but preferably both. Most brawlers are laborers and crafters who blow off steam carousing when they can scrap up the funds and scrapping when they run out. Particularly skilled brawlers can make a living fighting for the entertainment of others.
Source: Ben Huffman - Pugilist
